Meta.title: IqUp — Discover your child's brain superpowers
Meta.description: A free, playful 5–10 minute game that reveals what your child is great at. No scores, no numbers. In Macedonian and English.

NotFound.heading: Oops! This page isn't here
NotFound.body: The link may be old or mistyped. Let's get you back on track.

hero.title: Discover your child's brain superpowers
hero.explainer: A short, playful game that shows what your child is great at. You get a warm profile of their strengths, never a score, a percentage, or an IQ number.

age.question: How old is your child?
age.hint: Pick an age to start the right adventure.

step1.title: Choose an age
step1.body: Tell us how old your child is, so they get the right games.

step2.title: Play short brain games
step2.body: Your child solves playful puzzles for about 5 to 10 minutes.

step3.title: See their strengths profile
step3.body: You get a warm profile of your child's strengths and a certificate to share. For younger ages, there's an invite to a free trial class too.

time.title: Just 5–10 minutes
time.body: Short and playful, made for small hands.

encouraging.title: Encouraging, with no scary numbers
encouraging.body: The result is a strengths profile, never a grade, a percentage, or an IQ.

data.title: Data kept in the EU
data.body: Stored securely, with a parent's consent.

reassurance.quote: We awaken the genius in every child.
reassurance.attribution: From the world of Bibi · IqUp

footer.line: Free brain games that reveal your child's strengths.
footer.org: The first Macedonian educational franchise for children.

meta.title: IqUp Brain Games — play the test
meta.description: Play the free IqUp brain games. Short, playful puzzles that reveal what your child is great at — no scores, no IQ number.

start.title: Ready for an adventure?
start.subtitle: There are no right or wrong answers — just look, think, and have fun.

reveal.title: Memory game
reveal.intro: Look carefully and remember what you see.

age.title: Let's start — how old is your child?
age.lead: Pick an age to play the right games.

Gate.heading: Just one last step
Gate.intro: Enter your email to see your child's results. We only use it to send the results and information about IqUp — no spam.

email.label: Parent's email
email.errorRequired: Enter an email so we can send the results.

consent.label: I'm the parent or guardian and I agree to IqUp using this information to send the results and details about IqUp's programs.
consent.error: Please tick the box to continue.

marketing.label: Send me occasional tips and news from IqUp.

Gate.privacyNote: Your data is stored securely in the EU and is only used for the results and information about IqUp.
Gate.error: Something went wrong sending your details. Your child's results are safe — please try again.

meta.title: Results — IqUp brain games
meta.description: A warm look at your child's strengths from the IqUp game.

og.headline: I finished the IqUp Brain Games!
og.tagline: Free brain games that reveal your child's strengths.

hero.title: Brilliant work, {name}!
hero.lede: Here's what the games revealed — your strongest areas, with no scores and no numbers.

constellation.celebratedSub: The areas that light up most
constellation.growingSub: Areas blossoming next — getting stronger with every game.

certificate.heading: Your certificate
certificate.text: A keepsake to hang on the wall or share with the family.
certificate.shareError: Couldn't open sharing — the site link was copied instead.
certificate.alt: IqUp certificate for {name}, celebrating their strongest areas: {strengths}.

trial.heading: Next step: a free trial class

ending.heading: What's next for a curious mind?
ending.signoff: From the world of Bibi · IqUp

Email.subject: {name}’s results are ready
Email.preview: A warm look at {name}’s strengths from the IqUp Brain Games.
Email.intro: Thank you for playing the IqUp Brain Games with {name}. Here’s a warm look at the strengths that shone through.
Email.certificateAttached: We’ve attached {name}’s certificate — print it for the wall, or share it with the family.

trial.heading: Come and play with us
trial.body: See your child’s curiosity in action at a free trial class — playful, hands-on, and with no pressure at all.

Email.curiousMind: These strengths are {name}’s to build on — keep feeding that curious mind.

footer.identity: IqUp — free brain games that reveal your child’s strengths.
footer.contact: Questions? Just reply to this email — we’re happy to help.
footer.signoff: From the world of Bibi · IqUp

banner.title: Cookies on IqUp
banner.body: We use cookies to improve the site and measure our marketing. Nothing turns on without your consent. Choose what you allow.

manage.title: Cookie settings
manage.intro: Choose which cookies you allow. Necessary ones are always on; the rest stay off until you turn them on.

necessary.title: Necessary
necessary.description: Needed for the site to work — they remember your cookie choice and your language. Always on.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Help us understand how the site is used (Google Analytics, Microsoft Clarity) so we can improve it.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.description: Measure how our Facebook and Instagram ads perform (Meta Pixel).

manage.note: Changes take effect immediately for new cookies; scripts already loaded fully stop on your next page load.

meta.title: Privacy & Cookie Policy — IqUp
meta.description: How IqUp collects and uses data, the rights you have, and which cookies we use.

Privacy.lead: This page explains what data we collect, why, and the rights you have. It's written plainly, for parents.
Privacy.draftNote: Working draft — this text is being prepared and is subject to legal review by IqUp.

meta.title: Book a free trial class · IqUp
meta.description: Book a free trial class directly with your nearest IqUp center. Pick your city and reach them in one tap.

og.headline: Book a free trial class
og.tagline: Directly with your nearest IqUp center

Trial.heading: Book a free trial class
Trial.intro: Trial classes are booked directly with your nearest IqUp center. Choose your city below and call, email, or get directions — no commitment.
Trial.mailBody: Hello, I'd like to book a free trial class. Please let me know which times are available. (You're welcome to share your child's age and a preferred time.) Thank you!

setup.title: Let's explore!
setup.lead: A short adventure of puzzles and games. There are no wrong answers — just do your best and have fun.
setup.ageHint: Pick your age so we can choose the right puzzles.

assist.title: A quick note before you start
assist.body: Your child is 5–7, so you're welcome to help with the technical parts — but the thinking should be all theirs.
rules: Read the instructions out loud if needed.
Hold or steady the device for them.
Let your child choose every answer themselves.
assist.checkbox: I understand — I'll help with technical things only and let my child choose the answers.

practice.label: Practice
practice.title: Let's try one together
practice.intro: This one doesn't count — it just shows how it works. Give it a try, then continue when you're ready.
practice.calibrationIntro: Tap the big circle a few times at your normal speed. This helps the puzzles feel just right on your device.

complete.title: All done — great exploring!
complete.body: You finished every part of the adventure and your puzzle is complete.
complete.badgeTagline: You explored every kind of puzzle today.
complete.gentleNote: Tip: for the clearest picture, the puzzles work best in a calm, unhurried moment.

retry.title: Let's try that again
retry.body: This run looked a little rushed, so the results wouldn't be a fair picture. Take a breath and give it another go when you're ready — you'll get a fresh set of puzzles.

gf.series: Which one comes next in the row?

gv.rotation: Which shape is the same one, just turned around?

gsm.corsi: Watch the tiles light up, then tap them in the same order.

gs.symbolSearch: Tap every matching shape — as fast as you can before time runs out!

ef.towerOfLondon: Move the balls so they match the goal.

glr.pairedAssociate: Remember which shapes go together, then find each match.

ct.sequence: Put the steps in order to get the robot to the flag.
ct.debug: One step is wrong. Tap the step that breaks the path.
ct.loop: Which loop does the same thing as the steps?
ct.conditional: Use the rules to work out what the robot does.
ct.maze: Order the steps to guide the robot through the maze to the flag.

meta.title: Your report — IqUp
meta.description: Leave your details to receive your child's personalised IqUp report.

Form.heading: Where should we send the report?
Form.intro: Your child did a great job! Leave your details and we'll email you a personalised report about their thinking strengths.

email.label: Email address
email.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

consent.process: I agree that my details may be used to prepare and send my child's report.
consent.guardian: I confirm I am the child's parent or legal guardian.
consent.marketing: I'd like to receive occasional tips and news from IqUp. (optional)
consent.processError: Please agree so we can send your report.
consent.guardianError: Please confirm you are the parent or guardian.

Form.privacyNote: We keep your child's results anonymous and never share your details.

interstitial.title: All done — your results are ready!
interstitial.body: We're putting your child's report together. Your results will appear here in a moment.

Results.title: Your child's profile
Results.heroCaption: All five areas together — one whole. The colour marks each area; the shape is the same for everyone.
Results.emailedHeading: Your full report is on its way to your inbox
Results.emailedBody: Check your email for a PDF with all the details.
Results.trialHeading: Next step: a free trial class
Results.trialBody: See how your child learns in person — no commitment.
Results.certificateBody: A joyful keepsake to share with the family.

validity.caveatHeading: This may not have been the calmest attempt
